body:
This is an initial working example with the cache in CliamAtmos. Thank you @dennisYatunin for your advice on how to hijack the ODE `p`.

So far I have `q_liq` and `q_ice` (the liquid and ice specific humidities) in the cache. Would be great to get comments on the proposed way of initialising the cache, before I move on and add other things there like pressure, temperature, etc. 

Also, @dennisYatunin already has an idea on how to do it better than hijacking `p`. But it will have to come in the next interface revamp.
title: Initial working example with cache
